codeReview.summary: Minimal, correct change adding '| \'devin\'' to the AgentType union in src/types.ts at line 17. The literal is inserted alphabetically between 'deepagents' and 'droid', consistent with the skill procedure and architecture.md guidance. No behavioral code was changed; no dead code introduced. The only source file touched is src/types.ts (1 line added). Mission state files (.mission/features.json, progress-log.jsonl, state.json) are updated correctly. The handoff documents one expected transient type error (Property 'devin' missing in Record<AgentType, AgentConfig>) which will be resolved by the next feature (devin-config). All 402 existing tests pass. Formatting is clean. The TDD deviation (skipping tests for a type-only change) is reasonable and well-documented.

summary: Clean pass. Single-line type addition is correct, alphabetically placed, well-documented, and introduces only the expected transient type error that the dependent devin-config feature will resolve.
